name: MySQL
scope: A person with BASIC proficiency in MySQL (1-2 years experience) is comfortable writing SELECT statements with WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT, and aggregates (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX). They can join 2-3 tables using INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN, filter and group results with GROUP BY / HAVING, and assign labels or tiered values using CASE WHEN expressions. They understand primary keys, foreign keys, common MySQL data types (INT, DECIMAL, VARCHAR, TEXT, DATETIME, ENUM, CHAR), and can read a relational schema spanning 3-4 tables with one-to-many relationships. They can write queries that combine arithmetic on columns (e.g. d_amount - d_refund_amount), filter on enum values, and return derived columns. They are not expected to write window functions, recursive CTEs, complex stored procedures, or perform advanced query tuning. The focus is on writing correct, readable MySQL queries against an existing, well-defined schema to answer specific business questions.
